before.decision: I am choosing to work on myself over investing (in time and emotion ) in her
before.prediction: I think there's a 90% chance that this leads to me achieving my goals-- PhD in Europe
before.hiddenAssumption: This only works if I am able to regulate my nervous system -- emotional regulation, stay focused -- and maintain my mental,  emotional and physical health.
before.adversarialCheck: The smartest person that disagrees would say-- without having an alternative for the emotional anchoring and outlet she provides I am bound to fail. I need a way to channel my energy

before.decision: I am choosing to complete HTGAA over iftar
before.prediction: There is a 80% probability that this leads to me finishing week 4 homework
before.hiddenAssumption: This only works if I execute without getting high on food low on fomo

after.resolution: I didn't go for iftar, I ended up sleeping the whole day, having dinner with Isabel and Amal, spoke for a huge amount of time with Rania and ended up doing nothing.
after.realLesson: Assumption that I can work without an emotional outlet was wrong. My emotional abilities have not progressed to that level
